<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-ê]][[de:Feuer-Schaf]][[hak:Tên-vi]][[ja:丁未]][[ko:정미]][[vi:Đinh Mùi]][[za:Dingmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]][[zh-yue:丁未]][[zh:丁未]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-ê]][[de:Feuer-Schaf]][[hak:Tên-vi]][[ja:丁未]][[ko:정미]][[vi:Đinh Mùi]][[za:Dingmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]][[zh-yue:丁未]][[zh:丁未]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-ê]][[de:Feuer-Schaf]][[hak:Tên-vi]][[ja:丁未]][[ko:정미]][[vi:Đinh Mùi]][[za:Dingmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]][[zh-yue:丁未]][[zh:丁未]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Goat|kanji=丁未|romaji=hinoto hitsuji|onyomi=teibi|p=dīwèi|w=ting-wei|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ weɪ̯|y=deng1 mei6|j=deng1 mei6|ci=tɛŋ mei|mc=tæŋ mei|oc-bs=tæŋ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Goat also known as  Teibi''' (丁未) (ひのとひつじ、ていかのひつじ、ていび) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 44th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Wushen|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}}’ {{ill|Mei|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mei|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q20128396}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and they interact by {{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Goat (丁未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: teibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongmi (정미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

<!--
==
* Yin Fire Goat (丁未) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのとひつじ (hinoto-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: ていかのひつじ (teika-no-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: ていび (teibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongmi
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Mùi

-->
==Years of Yin Fire Goat==
A Common Era year that leaves a remainder of 47 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=Year|1=Year}} of Teibi.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Teibi'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 47|en|AD 47|WD=Q24938|lt=47 AD|1=AD 47}}
* {{ill|AD 107|en|AD 107|WD=Q29980|lt=107 AD|1=AD 107}}
* {{ill|167|en|167|WD=Q30678|lt=167 AD|1=167}}
* {{ill|227|en|227|WD=Q33009|lt=227 AD|1=227}}
* {{ill|287|en|287|WD=Q30992|lt=287 AD|1=287}}
* {{ill|347|en|347|WD=Q33232|lt=347 AD|1=347}}
* {{ill|407|en|407|WD=Q30997|lt=407 AD|1=407}}
* {{ill|467|en|467|WD=Q30918|lt=467 AD|1=467}}
* {{ill|527|en|527|WD=Q31025|lt=527 AD|1=527}}
* {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD|1=587}}
* {{ill|647|en|647|WD=Q31111|lt=647 AD|1=647}}
* {{ill|AD 707|en|AD 707|WD=Q23510|lt=707 AD|1=AD 707}}
* {{ill|AD 767|en|AD 767|WD=Q30561|lt=767 AD|1=AD 767}}
* {{ill|827|en|827|WD=Q30352|lt=827 AD|1=827}}
* {{ill|887|en|887|WD=Q25010|lt=887 AD|1=887}}
* {{ill|947|en|947|WD=Q24333|lt=947 AD|1=947}}
|
* {{ill|1007|en|1007|WD=Q19233|lt=1007 AD|1=1007}}
* {{ill|1067|en|1067|WD=Q19418|lt=1067 AD|1=1067}}
* {{ill|1127|en|1127|WD=Q23827|lt=1127 AD|1=1127}}
* {{ill|1187|en|1187|WD=Q19731|lt=1187 AD|1=1187}}
* {{ill|1247|en|1247|WD=Q5482|lt=1247 AD|1=1247}}
* {{ill|1307|en|1307|WD=Q5717|lt=1307 AD|1=1307}}
* {{ill|1367|en|1367|WD=Q6202|lt=1367 AD|1=1367}}
* {{ill|1427|en|1427|WD=Q6305|lt=1427 AD|1=1427}}
* {{ill|1487|en|1487|WD=Q6652|lt=1487 AD|1=1487}}
* {{ill|1547|en|1547|WD=Q6547|lt=1547 AD|1=1547}}
* {{ill|1607|en|1607|WD=Q6756|lt=1607 AD|1=1607}}
* {{ill|1667|en|1667|WD=Q7588|lt=1667 AD|1=1667}}
* {{ill|1727|en|1727|WD=Q6942|lt=1727 AD|1=1727}}
* {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787 AD|1=1787}}
* {{ill|1847|en|1847|WD=Q7644|lt=1847 AD|1=1847}}
* {{ill|1907|en|1907|WD=Q2048|lt=1907 AD|1=1907}}
* {{ill|1967|en|1967|WD=Q2648|lt=1967 AD|1=1967}}
|
* {{ill|2027|en|2027|WD=Q12814|lt=2027 AD|1=2027}}
* {{ill|2087 AD|ja|2087年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2087|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2087 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2080年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2147 AD|ja|2147年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2147|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2147 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2207 AD|ja|2207年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2207|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2207 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2267 AD|ja|2267年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2267|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2267 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2327 AD|ja|2327年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2327|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2327 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2387 AD|ja|2387年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2387|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2387 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2447 AD|ja|2447年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2447|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2447 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 25世紀|1=25th century|WD=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2507 AD|ja|2507年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2507|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2507 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2567 AD|ja|2567年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2567|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2567 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2627 AD|ja|2627年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2627|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2627 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2687 AD|ja|2687年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2687|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2687 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2747 AD|ja|2747年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2747|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2747 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2807 AD|ja|2807年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2807|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2807 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2867 AD|ja|2867年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2867|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2867 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2927 AD|ja|2927年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2927|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2927 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2987 AD|ja|2987年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2987|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2987 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* The conflict in {{ill|587|en|587|WD=Q30891|lt=587 AD|1=587}} between the {{ill|Soga clan|en|Soga clan|WD=Q909854|lt=Soga clan|1=Soga clan}} and the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|WD=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} is known as the {{ill|Soga–Mononobe conflict|en|Soga–Mononobe conflict|WD=Q534720|lt=Teibi Rebellion|1=Soga–Mononobe conflict}}.

==Months of Yin Fire Goat==
In a Common Era year, if the final digit is 2 or 7 (that is, when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), then {{ill|June|en|June|WD=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Teibi. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|WD=Q1190976|lt=Shōsho|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rittō|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Goat==
=== Day Selection ===
A day of Teibi is the 15th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Īt-chik]]
[[zh-yue:乙亥]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Goat|qq=ja|丁未|version=98658167|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Varkvi]]
[[de:Yin Fire Goat]]

[[ja:丁未]]

[[zh:丁未]]
[[ko:정미]]
[[fr:Chèvre de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Schaf]]

[[af:Houtvark (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Schweineen]]
[[en:Wood Pig]]
[[fr:Cochon de boisboishak]]
[[it:Yit-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:을해]]
[[vi:Ất Hợi]]
[[za:Yitceij]]
[[zh:乙亥]]
[[ar:Yin Fire Goat]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yin Fire Goat--><!--Yin Fire Goat--><!--Yin Fire Goat--><!--Yin Fire Goat-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Dĭng-ê]]
[[hak:Tên-vi]]
[[vi:Đinh Mùi]]
[[za:Dingmeih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]]
[[zh-yue:丁未]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurbok (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Dĭng-ê]]
[[hak:Tên-vi]]
[[vi:Đinh Mùi]]
[[za:Dingmeih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-bī]]
[[zh-yue:丁未]]
{{wikidata link|Q905292}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
